step.name: author-sdl
step.action: Write schema.graphql. Define Query, Mutation, types with explicit relations. Use Relay connection types for paginated lists.

step.name: run-codegen
step.action: Generate server + client types. Commit generated files (or build them in CI).

step.name: implement-resolvers
step.action: Wire resolvers against repos. Keep them thin: call service-layer functions.

step.name: wire-dataloaders
step.action: For each 1:N relation, declare DataLoader factory in request context. Replace per-call repo lookups with loader.load.
step.decision-gate: If a relation cannot be batched (rare), document why and accept the per-call cost explicitly.

step.name: enforce-depth-and-complexity
step.action: Configure depth limit (5-8) and complexity cap. Run worst-case query in CI to ensure caps don't break legitimate use.

step.name: enable-diff-gate
step.action: Add CI job: graphql-inspector diff vs main. Fail on breaking unless BREAKING-CHANGE token in commit body.
